query: SELECT item_key, funding_source, section, scenario FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = 4 AND scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND item_key IN ('developer_fee_offplan','fraz_fee','rera_registration','rera_units','noc_fee','escrow_fee','community_fee','marketing_offplan','escrow_deposit','contractor_advance') ORDER BY item_key;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT item_key, funding_source, section, scenario FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE project_id = 4 AND scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND item_key IN ('developer_fee_offplan','fraz_fee','rera_registration','rera_units','noc_fee','escrow_fee','community_fee','marketing_offplan','escrow_deposit','contractor_advance') ORDER BY item_key;
